message:
security(node): extend constant-time hash comparisons to 3 more modules

Continuation of timing-attack mitigation: replace direct equality checks on
cryptographic hashes with ct_eq() in ecosystem_registry, certification, and
reputation modules. Each module also gains a tamper_same_length() test helper
and a test verifying that single-byte mutations on same-length hashes are
detected by the constant-time comparison path.

- connector/ecosystem_registry.rs: Audit trail hash verification now uses
  ct_eq(). Added test_audit_trail_integrity_detects_same_length_hash_tamper.

- supply_chain/certification.rs: Audit entry hash verification now uses
  ct_eq(). Added test_audit_trail_integrity_detects_same_length_hash_tamper
  covering extension registration + promotion flow.

- supply_chain/reputation.rs: Audit trail hash check switched to ct_eq().
  Added corresponding same-length tamper detection test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
